title: Vladimir Putin arrives in Beijing for state visit hot on heels of Trump
summary_full: Russian president is welcomed to Beijing with an honour guard after saying relations with China have reached an ‘unprecedented level’  Vladimir Putin has arrived in Beijing for a state visit, four days after Donald Trump left China.Putin was greeted by China’s foreign minister, Wang Yi, when he landed on Tuesday evening, with an honour guard alongside Chinese youths waving China and Russia’s national flags in a welcome ceremony on the tarmac. Continue reading...
